<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Downloads findings export"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/governance/data/findings/exports/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Downloads a DLP findings export as a CSV file.
